problem id: 5a7c5b0a
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(3) XOR NOT SHL(5)) OR SHR(2)

examples:
  10000010 -> 10101011
  00000111 -> 00100111
  00101011 -> 11001110
  00111100 -> 10011111
  10111001 -> 00111110
  00111111 -> 11101111
  11000011 -> 10110001
  01010010 -> 00111101
  01010001 -> 01010101

query: 10011000
predicted answer: 00111111
